headline: Raymond James Lifts PT on Visa Inc. (V) on Solid Q1 Results
summary: Visa Inc. (NYSE:V) is one of the best strong buy stocks to invest in according to billionaires. On April 29, Raymond James lifted the price target on Visa Inc. (NYSE:V) to $389 from $380, maintaining an Outperform rating on the shares and telling investors in a research note that the company reported strong fiscal Q1 results. […]
